title: Buro's Vibrant Visuals
description: My attempt at remaking the upcoming Vibrant Visuals update.
body:
An attempt at remaking the Vibrant Visuals update!

Courtesy of; Miniature Shaders, Hold My Items, DetailedAnimationsTester, Sounds, and many more!

# Pixelated Shadows + Player Animations
![Pixelated Shadows and DetailedAnimationsTester V0.13](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2060e98c57f753295e8af0f986c758d0f0ffcff5.png)
- With Miniature Shaders and DetailedAnimationsTester Resourcepack!

# First Person Animation
![Hold My Items Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22217d044375f6fc76c4dca9ffcb95d93ce6e1bb.png)
- With Hold My Items Mod!

# Shrimp's Immersive Interface
![Shrimp's Immersive Interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9bbe6ee00d1dcd851a023dbec4d80b33b8a6969.png)
- With Shrimp's Immersive Interface Resourcepack!

Huge thanks to Simply Optimized for the optimization modpack base <3
